patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..bde8b3a 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -386,6 +386,9 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
 
         # Work out what thread to run the code in
         if self._thread_sensitive:
+            executor = self._executor
+        else:
+            # Use the passed in executor, or the loop's default if it is None
             current_thread_executor = getattr(AsyncToSync.executors, "current", None)
             if current_thread_executor:
                 # If we have a parent sync thread above somewhere, use that
@@ -413,9 +416,6 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                 # Otherwise, we run it in a fixed single thread
                 executor = self.single_thread_executor
                 self.deadlock_context.set(True)
-        else:
-            # Use the passed in executor, or the loop's default if it is None
-            executor = self._executor
 
         context = contextvars.copy_context()
         child = functools.partial(self.func, *args, **kwargs)
@@ -459,7 +459,6 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             self.deadlock_context.set(False)
 
         return ret
-
     def __get__(
         self, parent: Any, objtype: Any
     ) -> Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]]:
@@ -516,32 +515,10 @@ def async_to_sync(
     ...
 
 
-def async_to_sync(
-    awaitable: Optional[
-        Union[
-            Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]],
-            Callable[_P, Awaitable[_R]],
-        ]
-    ] = None,
-    *,
-    force_new_loop: bool = False,
-) -> Union[
-    Callable[
-        [Union[Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]], Callable[_P, Awaitable[_R]]]],
-        Callable[_P, _R],
-    ],
-    Callable[_P, _R],
-]:
+def async_to_sync ( awaitable: Optional[ Union[ Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]], Callable[_P, Awaitable[_R]], ] ] = None, *, force_new_loop: bool = False, ) -> Union[ Callable[ [Union[Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]], Callable[_P, Awaitable[_R]]]], Callable[_P, _R], ], Callable[_P, _R], ] :
     if awaitable is None:
-        return lambda f: AsyncToSync(
-            f,
-            force_new_loop=force_new_loop,
-        )
-    return AsyncToSync(
-        awaitable,
-        force_new_loop=force_new_loop,
-    )
-
+        return lambda f: AsyncToSync(f, force_new_loop=force_new_loop)
+    return AsyncToSync(awaitable, force_new_loop=force_new_loop)
 
 @overload
 def sync_to_async(
